title: AI robotics firm Exyn prices $19M IPO at $7.75/unit
content:
Worawith Ounpeng

 	* Exyn Technologies (EXYN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/EXYN]) priced [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20516818-exyn-announces-pricing-of-initial-public-offering] its IPO of 2.5M units at $7.75 per unit, targeting gross proceeds of about $19.4 million.
 	* Exyn develops AI-powered autonomous robotics and mapping technologies for industrial applications, including mining, construction, and infrastructure inspection.
 	* Each unit consists of one share of common stock and one warrant, with the common stock and warrants expected to trade on Nasdaq under the symbols “EXYN” and “EXYNW,” respectively. 
 	* The underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional 375,000 shares of its common stock and/or 375,000 warrants. 
 	* The offering is expected to close on May 18.
